hero.bio: Fast, accessible, visually sharp — I craft frontends that hold up under real load, real users, and real scrutiny.
about.label: About
about.heading: Who I am
about.bio1: I'm a frontend engineer based in Serbia, focused on building fast, accessible, and visually sharp digital products — from marketing sites to complex web and mobile applications.
about.bio2: I also work across the full stack when the project calls for it — handling API design, database architecture, and backend logic. I care about the details that most people don't notice until they're missing.
projects.label: Work
projects.heading: Selected Work
contact.label: Contact
contact.heading:
Let's work
together
contact.subtext: Have a project in mind or want to discuss a collaboration? Send me a message and I'll get back to you.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
contact.success.label: Sent
contact.success.heading: Message received.
contact.success.text: Thanks for reaching out — I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
pricing.label: services
pricing.heading: Work with me.
pricing.subtext: Transparent pricing for websites, apps and monthly maintenance. Every quote is tailored to the project scope.
pricing.maintenance.intro: All post-delivery work goes through the client portal — you open a task, I confirm the estimate, then we get to work. No hidden costs, no monthly obligations you don't use.
pricing.addons.intro: These services can be added to any package or ordered separately.
pricing.addons.note: * All prices are estimates and depend on specific requirements, content scope, and deadlines.
pricing.cta.heading: Describe your project and I'll suggest the right package.
